title: FMB - Fabtech Buildings Material
content:
Fabtech Modular Buildings is a unit of the Fabtech Group that specializes in the design and building of Cold Form Steel (CFS) buildings, which in turn addresses the growing demand of temporary/permanent site offices and accommodation facilities.
Fabtech Modular Buildings redefines the modular industry by offering buildings which are not only affordable and fast track, but also environment friendly and energy efficient. Through carefully regulated operations, both during production as well as installation, we at Fabtech are proud to say that we have been able to lower our carbon footprint.
Housed in a state of art facility situated at Dubai Industrial Park, we not only enjoy a vast expanse of workable area but also have access to specialized machinery and necessary logistics support. Manufacturing building components off-site provides for more controlled conditions and allows for improved quality and precision in the fabrication of the component. Another important aspect of the Fabtech Group is the constant training of their employees, staff and workers alike. At Fabtech we believe that learning is a continuous process and hence our employees are regularly made to attend training sessions to improve efficiency, learn new work practices or simply hone existing ones.
We recognize that different customers have varying desires and value customizability. Hence we offer a spectrum of building options. Buildings will be constructed in the factory as modules. Modules of standard (transportable) size can be combined in different ways to produce different floor plans in a wide array of sizes, allowing the customer the opportunity to customize their buildings. Modules are 50 to 95% complete depending on size and type when transported to the site. The result is a beautiful, high performing, healthy, green building at the price lower than of a traditional, on-site-built building.
Our state-of-the-art modular manufacturing facility in Dubai Industrial Park is located adjacent to Emirates road and Sheikh Mohammed Bin Zayed Road. The facility allows for transportation of finished modular buildings (using trailers) to construction sites throughout Middle East. Proximity to JAFZA is an added advantage which enables us to export modular buildings to our overseas clients.
Our facility is fully equipped with computerized cold form steel framing machines, overhead / gantry cranes and hot rolled steel fabrication machineries to name a few.
At the facility a team of Engineering and Construction professionals work on cold form steel framing, carpentry, electrical, fire alarm, plumbing and other related activities. Our manufacturing facility offers the best working environment that creates a more efficient and safe workspace for better quality and faster production.
Address: Dubai Industrial City - Dubai
Phone: 04 374 2700

MO 304, Jebel Ali free Zone, Dubai, UAE
